label: AI Insight UI — Admin (Keycloak proxy)
info:
Read-only proxy onto the Keycloak Admin API for the UI's admin views:
  GET /api/v1/admin/users   — list users in the FACIS realm
  GET /api/v1/admin/roles   — list realm roles + member counts
  GET /api/v1/admin/access  — recent login/logout/role-change events

Requires environment: KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_URL, KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_USER, KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD, KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_REALM (default 'facis'). The flow caches the master-realm token in flow context with TTL refresh on 401.

name: route to KC + shape
